text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, Trainer—don't I seem even more dazzling
than usual today?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I attended a tea party with King! And
it gave me an explosive boost in princess power!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Did you know that King doesn't down her scones in one mouthful?! She's so elegant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending an enjoyable day off with her idol,
Kawakami Princess is brimming with motivation!
